seo-services.heroTitle: Rank Higher. Get Found. Grow Faster.
seo-services.heroSubtitle: We don't just optimize pages — we engineer search dominance across Google, AI Overviews, and every generative engine your customers are already using.

subServices.title: On-Page SEO
subServices.desc: We optimize every element Google reads: title tags, meta descriptions, H1-H6 structure, internal linking, image alt tags, schema markup, and URL structure. Your pages become technically perfect.

subServices.title: Off-Page SEO
subServices.desc: We build your domain authority through strategic link acquisition — editorial backlinks from DR 50+ domains, guest posts, digital PR campaigns, and HARO outreach that signals trust to Google.

subServices.title: Link Building
subServices.desc: Our link building goes beyond quantity. Every link we acquire is relevant, authoritative, and manually vetted. We target niche-specific publications that send real referral traffic alongside ranking power.

subServices.title: Technical SEO
subServices.desc: Core Web Vitals optimization, crawl budget management, canonical tags, XML sitemaps, robots.txt, hreflang for multi-language sites, structured data, and page speed optimization to Lighthouse 90+.

subServices.title: AIO Optimization
subServices.desc: AI Overviews (AIO) are appearing in 20%+ of searches. We optimize your content to be selected as the AI Overview source — using E-E-A-T signals, FAQ schema, and concise authoritative answers.

subServices.title: GEO (Generative Engine)
subServices.desc: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude are sending real traffic. We optimize your brand's presence across all generative engines using structured content, brand mentions, and citation building.

process.title: Discovery & Audit
process.desc: Full technical audit, competitor analysis, keyword gap analysis, and baseline ranking report. We map your exact path to dominance.

process.title: Technical Foundation
process.desc: Fix all crawl errors, Core Web Vitals issues, duplicate content, and site architecture problems. Build the perfect technical foundation.

process.title: Content Strategy
process.desc: Keyword-mapped content calendar, pillar page strategy, and optimization of existing high-potential pages for maximum ranking velocity.

process.title: Link Building
process.desc: Systematic acquisition of high-authority backlinks through editorial outreach, digital PR, and strategic partnerships.

process.title: AIO & GEO
process.desc: Optimize for AI search engines — restructure content for featured snippets, AI Overviews, and generative engine citations.

process.title: Report & Scale
process.desc: Monthly ranking reports with keyword movement, traffic growth, and ROI attribution. We scale what works.

timeline.note: SEO is a long-term investment. Our clients see consistent growth for years after engagement.

testimonials.name: James Harlow
testimonials.text: We went from page 4 to position 1 in 5 months. Rankston's SEO team is the real deal — not theory, actual results. $2.4M in additional revenue tracked back to organic search.

testimonials.name: Lisa Chen
testimonials.text: They got us into the AI Overviews for our top 3 search terms within 3 months. Our competitors can't figure out how we're appearing in Google's AI answers. Worth every penny.

testimonials.name: Mike Torres
testimonials.text: Our organic leads tripled in 6 months. The monthly reporting is crystal clear — I always know exactly what I'm getting for my investment.

faqs.q: How long does SEO take to see results?
faqs.a: You'll typically see measurable improvements in rankings within 60–90 days. Significant traffic growth usually happens between months 4–6. This depends on your industry competition, domain authority, and how aggressively we can execute.

faqs.q: What is AIO optimization and why does it matter?
faqs.a: AI Overviews (AIO) appear at the top of Google results for millions of searches, showing an AI-generated answer. If your content is selected as the source, you get massive visibility even if you're not ranking #1. We optimize specifically for this.

faqs.q: Do you guarantee first page rankings?
faqs.a: We don't make ranking guarantees — anyone who does is lying to you. What we guarantee is a proven, transparent process executed by senior SEO specialists, monthly reporting, and a track record of 876% average traffic growth.

faqs.q: What's the difference between on-page and off-page SEO?
faqs.a: On-page SEO covers everything on your website — content, title tags, structure, speed. Off-page SEO is everything outside your site — backlinks, brand mentions, authority signals. Both are required for competitive rankings.

faqs.q: How do you build backlinks for my site?
faqs.a: We use editorial outreach (earning links from relevant publications naturally), digital PR (creating linkable assets like studies and infographics), HARO responses, and guest posting on high-DA sites. We never buy links or use private blog networks.

faqs.q: Will you optimize for ChatGPT and Perplexity as well?
faqs.a: Yes — this is our GEO service. We build your brand's authority signals so that AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude recommend and cite your business when users ask relevant questions.

web-development.heroTitle: Websites That Work While You Sleep.
web-development.heroSubtitle: We build fast, beautiful, conversion-optimized websites — WordPress for local businesses, enterprise platforms for growing brands. Every site is built to rank and sell.

subServices.title: WordPress Development
subServices.desc: Clean, fast, SEO-ready WordPress sites for local businesses. Custom themes, essential plugins, CMS training, and ongoing support. No page-builder bloat.

subServices.title: Enterprise Web Solutions

subServices.title: Landing Page Design

subServices.title: E-Commerce Development
subServices.desc: WooCommerce and custom e-commerce solutions — product catalog, payment gateway integration, inventory management, and mobile-first checkout flows.

subServices.title: Core Web Vitals Optimisation
subServices.desc: LCP, FID, CLS optimized. Image compression, code splitting, lazy loading, CDN configuration. We hit Lighthouse 90+ on every project.

subServices.title: Maintenance & Support
subServices.desc: Monthly plugin updates, security monitoring, uptime alerts, performance reviews, and content updates. Your site stays fast and secure long after launch.

process.title: Discovery & Sitemap
process.desc: We map your goals, audience, and required functionality. Define page hierarchy, user flows, and technical stack.

process.title: Design Mockups
process.desc: Full design mockups in Figma. We present desktop + mobile views and iterate until you're 100% happy before writing a line of code.

process.title: Development
process.desc: We build the approved design — pixel-perfect, mobile-first, with clean semantic code and SEO structure baked in from the start.

process.title: Speed & SEO QA
process.desc: Lighthouse audit, Core Web Vitals fixes, schema markup, meta tags, XML sitemap, and cross-browser testing before launch.

process.title: Launch
process.desc: DNS migration, SSL configuration, Analytics setup (GA4, Search Console), and a full post-launch check.

process.title: Ongoing Support
process.desc: Monthly maintenance plans available. We monitor, update, and improve your site continuously.

timeline.note: Timeline depends on project complexity and feedback speed. We always deliver on schedule.

testimonials.name: Ryan Patel
testimonials.text: Our old site took 8 seconds to load. Rankston rebuilt it and now it loads in 1.8 seconds and converts 4x more visitors into appointment bookings. Incredible ROI.

testimonials.name: Sandra O.
testimonials.text: They built our e-commerce site in 3 weeks and it's beautiful. More importantly, it sells. Our online revenue went up 280% in the first quarter after launch.

testimonials.name: Chris V.
testimonials.text: Enterprise-grade work. Complex API integrations, a client portal, and a CMS — all delivered on time and exactly as spec'd. These guys know what they're doing.

faqs.q: How long does it take to build a website?
faqs.a: A standard WordPress site takes 2–3 weeks. Landing pages take 1 week. Custom enterprise sites typically take 6–12 weeks depending on complexity.

faqs.q: Do you build on WordPress or custom code?
faqs.a: Both. For local businesses and content sites, WordPress with custom theme development is the right choice. For complex applications, portals, and enterprise needs, we use React/Next.js or custom backend solutions.

faqs.q: Will my website be mobile-friendly?
faqs.a: 100% yes. Every site we build is mobile-first — we design and test on mobile before desktop. Over 60% of web traffic is mobile and Google indexes mobile-first.

faqs.q: Do you handle hosting?
faqs.a: We can recommend and set up hosting (we prefer Cloudflare + Vercel or WP Engine for WordPress) or work with your existing host. Hosting costs are separate from development.

faqs.q: Will I be able to update the content myself?
faqs.a: Yes. We deliver CMS training and documentation so you can update pages, blog posts, images, and products yourself without needing a developer.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.text: My Instagram went from 1,200 to 22,000 followers in 6 months and I'm now fully booked 3 months in advance. The content they create is stunning.

testimonials.name: David Kim
testimonials.text: LinkedIn is now our #1 lead source. Rankston's strategy turned our company page into a content machine that generates 4–6 qualified leads per week.

testimonials.name: Sophie B.
testimonials.text: Our TikTok videos went viral twice in the first month. The team just gets social media. Our foot traffic doubled after 90 days.

faqs.q: Which social media platforms do you manage?
faqs.a: We manage Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, and X (Twitter). We recommend 2–3 platforms based on where your target audience actually is.

faqs.q: Do you create the content or do I need to provide it?
faqs.a: We create everything — copy, graphics, reels scripts, carousels. You approve content before it goes live. We can also repurpose your existing photos/videos.

faqs.q: How do you measure success?
faqs.a: Beyond vanity metrics (likes, followers), we track click-throughs to your website, lead form submissions from social traffic, and revenue attributed via UTM parameters and GA4.

faqs.q: How is your paid social different from just boosting posts?
faqs.a: Boosting is the least effective way to spend ad budget. We build structured campaigns with audience segmentation, creative A/B testing, conversion pixel tracking, and algorithmic bid optimization.

faqs.q: Can you match my existing brand style?

testimonials.name: Marco D.

faqs.q: Do I need to provide my own footage?

faqs.q: What format should I send my footage in?

faqs.q: How long before I see results from content marketing?

testimonials.name: Linda H.
testimonials.text: We went from position 8 in the map pack to position 2 in 11 weeks. Phone calls from Google Maps tripled. Rankston's GMB service is the best money I've spent.

testimonials.name: Tony P.
testimonials.text: Before Rankston, nobody could find us on Google Maps. Now we get 25+ calls per week from the Map Pack alone. Revenue up 180% in 4 months.

faqs.q: What is the Google Map Pack?
faqs.a: The Map Pack is the block of 3 local business listings that appears below the Google Maps widget when someone searches for a local service. It receives 44% of all clicks for local searches.

faqs.q: How long to rank in the Map Pack?
faqs.a: Most clients see ranking movement within 30–45 days and reach the top 3 within 60–90 days. High-competition markets may take 3–4 months.

faqs.q: Do I need a physical address to rank in the Map Pack?
faqs.a: Yes, you need a verified Google Business Profile with a legitimate business address. Service-area businesses (like plumbers) can hide their address while still ranking in target service areas.

timeline.note: PPC generates leads from day 1. It takes 2–3 months of data to fully optimize for peak performance.

testimonials.name: Greg F.
testimonials.text: We were spending $8,000/month on Google Ads with zero idea where the money was going. Rankston cut our waste by 60% and tripled our leads on the same budget.

testimonials.name: Maria S.
testimonials.text: Our Meta Ads were a disaster before Rankston. Now we get 40–60 cleaning service leads per month at $12 per lead. Life-changing for our business.

faqs.q: How much should I budget for Google Ads?
faqs.a: We typically recommend a minimum of $1,000–$1,500/month in ad spend for local businesses. E-commerce and competitive industries often need $3,000–$10,000/month to see meaningful volume.

faqs.q: What is ROAS and what should I expect?
faqs.a: ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) measures revenue generated per dollar spent on ads. A 4x ROAS means $4 revenue for every $1 spent. Our clients average 4.8x ROAS after 90 days of optimization.

faqs.q: How is your fee structured?
faqs.a: We charge a management fee (not a percentage of ad spend) so our incentives are always aligned with performance, not with spending more of your budget.

faqs.q: What tools do you use for automation?

faqs.q: Do I need to replace my existing software?

faqs.q: How technical do I need to be to use the automations?
faqs.a: Not technical at all. We build dashboards and simplified interfaces. We train your team and provide documentation. Most clients manage everything without any technical knowledge.

subServices.desc: Automated Instagram DM responses to comments and messages — qualifies leads, sends price lists, books consultations, and nurtures followers.

subServices.title: Facebook Messenger Bot
subServices.desc: Messenger chatbot for your Facebook Business Page — handles inquiries, runs lead gen campaigns, and books appointments from your Facebook audience.

subServices.title: Lead Qualification Bot
subServices.desc: Intelligent qualification flows that ask the right questions, score leads based on budget/timeline/need, and only send hot leads to your sales team.

subServices.title: Appointment Booking Bot
subServices.desc: Bot that shows available slots, books directly into your calendar (Calendly, Google Calendar, etc.), sends confirmations, and handles rescheduling.

process.title: Bot Brief
process.desc: We define the bot's purpose, key questions it must answer, and desired user flows.

process.title: Knowledge Training
process.desc: Bot trained on your business — services, pricing, FAQs, policies, and objection handling.

process.title: Flow Design
process.desc: Conversation flows built and tested. Multiple paths for different user intents.

process.title: Integration
process.desc: Bot connected to your website, WhatsApp, CRM, and calendar.

process.title: Testing
process.desc: Real conversation testing across all scenarios. Edge cases handled.

process.title: Launch & Train
process.desc: Bot goes live. Your team trained to manage conversations it escalates.

timeline.note: Leads start coming in from day 1 of launch.

testimonials.name: Sarah T.
testimonials.text: Our WhatsApp bot books 30+ appointments per week without us lifting a finger. Customers love the instant reply. Revenue up 140% since we launched it.

testimonials.name: Omar K.
testimonials.text: The website chat bot qualifies 200+ leads per month. We only talk to serious buyers now. Our close rate went from 18% to 64% because we're only talking to hot leads.

faqs.q: Will the chatbot sound robotic?
faqs.a: No. Our bots are trained with natural conversational language specific to your brand voice. Most users don't realize they're talking to a bot.

faqs.q: What happens when the bot can't answer a question?
faqs.a: The bot escalates to a human — sending an alert to your team via email, SMS, or your CRM. You only get involved for complex conversations.

faqs.q: Can the bot handle multiple languages?
faqs.a: Yes. We can deploy multilingual bots that detect the user's language and respond accordingly.

faqs.q: What platforms can the bot be deployed on?
faqs.a: Website (live chat widget), WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, Facebook Messenger, Telegram, and SMS.
